title: Pebbles from Cobblestone (Twigs addon)
description: Lets you uncraft 1 Cobblestone into 4 Pebbles from the Twigs mod.
body: A [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs) addon mod/datapack that lets you uncraft 1 Cobblestone into 4 Pebbles. Very useful for crafting Rocky Dirt, which is crafted with 2 Pebbles and 2 Dirt.
